allow: Bash(sed -i 's|<button class="theme-btn" id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">🌙</button>|<button class="theme-btn" id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle theme"></button>|g' index.html resume.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<button class="theme-btn" id="themeToggle" aria-label="切换主题">🌙</button>|<button class="theme-btn" id="themeToggle" aria-label="切换主题"></button>|g' contact-wechat.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<button class="theme-btn" id="themeToggle">🌙</button>|<button class="theme-btn" id="themeToggle"></button>|g' articles/*.html projects/*.html)

Bash(sed -i 's|<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="favicon.svg" />|<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="favicon.svg" />\\n  <meta name="theme-color" content="#f8fafc" id="themeColorMeta" />|g' index.html resume.html contact-wechat.html)

Bash(sed -i 's|<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="../favicon.svg" />|<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="../favicon.svg" />\\n  <meta name="theme-color" content="#f8fafc" id="themeColorMeta" />|g' articles/*.html projects/*.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 96px 24px 64px;/max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 96px 24px 64px;/' index.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 90px 24px 60px;/max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 90px 24px 60px;/' resume.html)
